description: Multi-step Snowpark pipeline — all compute pushed to Snowflake (one query plan per asset).

outputs.description: Materialized to one or more Snowflake tables, or returned as pandas (sink kind=none)

connection.description: Snowpark connection params (account/user/password/role/warehouse/database/schema). Any field may end with '_env_var' to read from an env var.

operations.description: Flat shape: Snowpark DataFrame ops. Supported: filter, select, drop, rename, with_columns, group_by, sort, limit, distinct, drop_nulls, join, union, sql.

sink.description: Top-level single-sink shape: {kind: table|none, table, mode: overwrite|append}

steps.description: Multi-step form. Each step: {id, source: {kind: table|sql|ref, ...}, operations: [...]}. 'op: sql' uses create_or_replace_temp_view('self' + step ids) + session.sql(...).

sinks.description: Multi-step form. Each sink: {from: <step_id>, kind: table|none, table, mode}.
